2026-04-09ICStatistics ActAppointment of a Chairperson of the Canadian Statistics Advisory CouncilAppointment of Benoit Dostie of Vaudreuil-sur-le-lac, Quebec, a member of the Canadian Statistics Advisory Council, to be Chairperson of the Canadian Statistics Advisory Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Chairperson of the Canadian Statistics Advisory Council
precis: Appointment of Benoit Dostie of Vaudreuil-sur-le-lac, Quebec, a member of the Canadian Statistics Advisory Council, to be Chairperson of the Canadian Statistics Advisory Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
